title: IzPhycoMods
description: These are the Mod folders that i use for pvp
body:
The modpack I currently use for PvP, and the one I used to get better in NethOP and Vanilla

It includes:

Many performance mods (Based on Sodium)

PvP Utility mods (like AppleSkin, Combat-Hitboxes, ArmorHUD, Effect Timer, Crosshair Indicator etc)

QOL mods (such as ScoreBoardTweaks)
